revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update - see [[Template talk:Refbegin#Template-protected edit request on 7 October 2023|talk page]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[ja:Refbegin]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Paine Ellsworth|wikipedia>Paine Ellsworth]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--

      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--

     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1

--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}

      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><!--
--><div class="refbegin <!--
-->{{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} <!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | <!--default to no columns-->
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="<!--
 -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |<!--default to no columns-->
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><templatestyles src="Refbegin/styles.css" /><div class="refbegin {{#if: {{{indent|}}} | refbegin-hanging-indents }} {{#if: {{{1|{{{colwidth|}}}}}} |
     {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
       | 
       | refbegin-columns references-column-width 
     }}
   }}
    " style="{{#if: {{{1|}}}
      |{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | 1 
        |
        | {{#iferror: {{#ifexpr: {{{1|1}}} > 1 }}
            | column-width: {{#if:1|{{{1|30em}}}}}
            | column-width: 30em 
          }}
       }}
      | {{#if: {{{colwidth|}}}
          | column-width: {{{colwidth|30em}}} 
        }} 
    }}"></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
